project: 教师资源发展平台 / China Teacher Resources Development Platform
note: Central harness configuration. 'level' is one of: off | warn | block. 'block' fails the gate (and blocks the commit); 'warn' prints a reminder but does not fail; 'off' skips the check. schemaCheck and promptLint are placeholders — their runners land together with harness/schema/ and the prompt corpus.

designJudge.note: Turn on (warn or block) once demo/ exists; the judge targets demo/.

schemaCheck.note: course-state.schema.json structural sanity + drift check against demo engine whitelist and adapter TURN_SCHEMA.

promptLint.note: Runtime prompt corpus (demo/src/prompts/) must keep carrying the spec §1 principles, §6 prohibitions, screening contract, and per-stage anchors.

tempCleanup.note: True scratch paths. Loose *.tmp files anywhere in the repo are also collected by clean-temp.mjs. When any exists with content, the gate reminds you to review and run `npm run clean:temp -- --apply` (confirm before deleting).

handoff.note: Tracked (NOT gitignored) handoff doc. Run /handoff, then capture the result into this file so the next session/agent can continue. Soft (warn-level): the file may not exist yet in this young repo; the gate nudges without blocking.

guard.note: Used by .claude/hooks/pre-edit-guard.mjs. 'deny' edits are refused; 'ask' edits trigger a user-confirmation prompt (native Claude Code permission ask); 'warn' edits are allowed with a note. Patterns: trailing '/' = directory, '*.ext' = extension, else exact filename / path suffix. source-docs/ is the immutable spec source — editing it requires explicit confirmation.
